summary: Current wave fixes are present and focused rerun checks pass, but AC2 and AC3 are still not fully proven for the whole task scope.

acceptance_criteria.reason: The current repository still preserves the screenshot-folder to route/template matching baseline described in the task artifacts, and this wave introduced no conflicting remap.

This wave confirms several screenshot-parity fixes, but there is still no fresh screenshot-by-screenshot proof for every screenshot-backed journal, and full parity for the metal-impurity closed state is not yet proven.

The UV runtime route/detail fix is confirmed and the touched files compile, but the broader no-screenshot smoke set still lacks fresh end-to-end proof for create/open/save/close/delete and persistence flows.
The repo-local task artifact set remains intact and the current wave is preserved incrementally under `.agent/tasks/journals-audit-loop/`.
Fresh rerun checks passed for the current wave: `npx tsc --noEmit` succeeded and targeted `eslint` returned 0 errors with warnings only.

checks_rerun.notes: No hardcoded fallback route remained in the acceptance breadcrumb.
Checklist fallback titles are template-aware in the current file.
Acceptance breadcrumb now uses route-aware title/route resolution.
UV detail page passes and uses `routeCode`.
